note: Minimal specimen definition. No lifecycle, no governance, no promotion mechanics. Object shape will emerge from observation across multiple interrogation sessions.

specimens.finding: Synthesis layer extends structural measurements into operational, dynamic, and universal claims without requiring matching evidence types
specimens.evidence: Recurred in every substantive challenge: 'everything flows through' (universal), 'rigidly locked' (operational), 'drift converging' (temporal), 'unstable' (dynamic), 'different remediation shapes' (intervention), 'attracts disproportionate operational stress' (runtime). Each extends a confirmed structural measurement into a claim the evidence chain does not close.
specimens.confidence: HIGH — recurred across every substantive challenge in the session

specimens.finding: Confidence qualifiers are correctly stated at verdict level but not propagated into finding-level statements
specimens.evidence: Advisory-bound qualifier exists at verdict header. Individual finding statements across all persona projections carry a confidence register that does not reflect the advisory-bound ceiling. Most visible when index file challenge forced retraction of constriction blocker characterization — the finding had been stated at full confidence while the qualifier was at verdict level only.
specimens.confidence: HIGH — appeared in every persona projection

specimens.finding: Combination conclusions inherit confidence ceiling from strongest component rather than floor from weakest
specimens.evidence: AMPLIFIED_DEP_FRAG: amplification mechanism depends on hub file role, hub is INDEX_FILE_UNCLASSIFIED, combination presented at HIGH severity inherited from confirmed pressure zone rather than classification uncertainty of the hub. Frontend convergence: three converging conditions, two confirmed, one (drift) unconfirmed — compound presented as three-condition convergence rather than two-confirmed-plus-one-unconfirmed.
specimens.confidence: MEDIUM — two independent specimens, same pattern

specimens.finding: Structural absence at architecturally significant domains is not surfaced as an explicit named condition
specimens.evidence: Fleet Operations — three domains, zero structural confirmation — appears only as 0% entry in structural mass table. Not named as a condition, not weighted as a finding, not disclosed as confidence boundary in synthesis. Identified as most consequential potential understatement across investor, PE acquisition, and board persona projections.
specimens.confidence: HIGH — identified independently across three persona projections as most consequential gap

specimens.finding: Evidence reference counts overstate path independence through repeated condition ID citations
specimens.evidence: SYSTEMIC_OP_FRAG lists 21 evidence references. Examination shows: dpc-pz-001 cited 3x, dck-isig-001 cited 3x, ec-domain-10 cited 3x, smc-cluster cited 2x. Four independent source artifacts but 21 references. Count implies breadth of independent evidence that unique source count does not support.
specimens.confidence: MEDIUM — single specimen but arithmetic is unambiguous

specimens.finding: Temporal characterizations (drift, deterioration, instability) produced from static structural evidence without temporal evidence gate
specimens.evidence: Drift finding challenged from five independent angles: weakest evidence trail (incomplete ISIG-002 consequence trace), semantic inference dependency (temporal claim from static data), narrative overstatement (dynamic characterization without temporal measurement), confidence inheritance (unconfirmed third leg of convergence), hostile due diligence ('show me the temporal data'). Five approaches, all converging on same gap.
specimens.confidence: HIGHEST — five independent analytical approaches converged on same finding

specimens.finding: Two risk zones characterized at different evidence depths presented with equivalent narrative weight in synthesis
specimens.evidence: Platform Infrastructure and Data: six independent evidence paths, four independent source artifacts, complete reconciliation, compound pressure zone, three signals at extreme z-scores. Frontend Application: confirmed fragility through non-index files, hub centrality, constriction measurements — but no compound pressure zone, incomplete consequence trace on governance gap signal, unconfirmed drift. Verdict presents both as co-equal in synthesis.
specimens.confidence: HIGH — asymmetry visible throughout entire session across all personas
